articles.description: Last week’s highly publicized decision in the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) case against Ripple, touted by many as a significant victory against the SEC and Chairman Gary Gensler, may not be the end of the story.

articles.title: Hackers compromise Uniswap founder’s Twitter account to promote scam
articles.description: Hayden Adams’ account released a tweet encouraging its more than 254,000 followers to click on a malicious link, falsely claiming that users’ tokens were at risk.

articles.title: Terra And Do Kwon Argue “Torres Doctrine” In Bid To Dismiss SEC Lawsuit
articles.description: Terra and Do Kwon’s legal team argued that the recent ruling in the case of US SEC v. Ripple Labs directly impacts their motion to dismiss. The SEC sued Do Kwon and his company for selling unregistered securities namely UST, LUNA, wLUNA, and MIR. Judge Analisa Torres ruled that cryptocurrency sales to retail investors on exchanges do not qualify as an investment contract i.e. a security....
